sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system data documented. Based on Mega Man 5 engine.

special_mechanics.name: Cape Deflection
special_mechanics.description: Darkwing can deflect certain projectiles with his cape by pressing Up on the control pad.

special_mechanics.name: Special Gas Weapons
special_mechanics.description: Player can collect different types of gas throughout stages: Thunder, Heavy, and Arrow. Each special gas requires ammunition, takes up different amounts, and functions differently. Only one type of special gas can be equipped at a time. Player can freely switch between special gas and standard Gas Gun using Select button.

tier_notes: Tier 2: Empirical/qualitative data only. Game is based on Mega Man 5 engine but no specific movement physics values are documented in available sources. Sources provide gameplay overview and historical information only, not technical movement parameters.
sources_used: Wikipedia (gameplay mechanics, release dates, developer info)
